name: coding-toolkit
description: Personal coding guardrails for Claude Code.

plugins.name: coding-toolkit
plugins.description: Coding principles skill (DRY/YAGNI/KISS/SINE, accuracy, milestone review, Codex delegation), a task-workflow PM skill (Obsidian-vault epics/milestones/tasks with a vendored Kanban board, handing off into superpowers), a warn-only PreToolUse worktree-gate hook, and a blocking PreToolUse hook that routes pre-migration tracker reads into the task-workflow skill.
